query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_tag (
    id              INT          NOT NULL,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    mod_time        BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    UNIQUE KEY uk_tag_name (name),
    KEY fk_tag_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_tag_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_application (
    id              INT          NOT NULL,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    extrahop_id     VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    discovery_id    VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    display_name    VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    description     TEXT         DEFAULT NULL,
    criteria        JSON         DEFAULT NULL,
    mod_time        BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    user_mod_time   BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    node_id         INT          DEFAULT NULL,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    KEY fk_app_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_app_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_network_locality (
    id              INT          NOT NULL,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    description     VARCHAR(1000) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    external        BOOLEAN      NOT NULL,
    mod_time        BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    network         VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,
    networks        JSON         NOT NULL,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    KEY fk_nl_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_nl_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_activity_map (
    id                  INT          NOT NULL,
    raw_id              BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    name                VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    description         TEXT         DEFAULT NULL,
    mod_time            BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    mode                VARCHAR(20)  DEFAULT NULL,
    show_alert_status   BOOLEAN      DEFAULT NULL,
    weighting           VARCHAR(20)  DEFAULT NULL,
    short_code          VARCHAR(50)  DEFAULT NULL,
    walks               JSON         DEFAULT NULL,
    polled_at           DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    KEY fk_am_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_am_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_application (
    id              INT          NOT NULL,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    extrahop_id     VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    discovery_id    VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    display_name    VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    description     TEXT         DEFAULT NULL,
    criteria        JSON         DEFAULT NULL,
    mod_time        BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    user_mod_time   BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    node_id         INT          DEFAULT NULL,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    KEY fk_app_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_app_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_network_locality (
    id              INT          NOT NULL,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    description     VARCHAR(1000) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    external        BOOLEAN      NOT NULL,
    mod_time        BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    network         VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,
    networks        JSON         NOT NULL,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    KEY fk_nl_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_nl_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_activity_map (
    id                  INT          NOT NULL,
    raw_id              BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    name                VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    description         TEXT         DEFAULT NULL,
    mod_time            BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    mode                VARCHAR(20)  DEFAULT NULL,
    show_alert_status   BOOLEAN      DEFAULT NULL,
    weighting           VARCHAR(20)  DEFAULT NULL,
    short_code          VARCHAR(50)  DEFAULT NULL,
    walks               JSON         DEFAULT NULL,
    polled_at           DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    KEY fk_am_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_am_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
